cases.description: Should trigger: setup CI/CD for Node.js app
cases.input: I need to set up CI/CD for my Node.js app. It uses Docker and deploys to Kubernetes.
cases.expect: Generates GitHub Actions config with lint, test, build, security scan, deploy stages

cases.description: Should trigger: create GitHub Actions workflow
cases.input: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests and deploys to staging
cases.expect: Complete .github/workflows/ci.yml with test + deploy staging + production gating

cases.description: Should trigger: GitLab CI pipeline for Python
cases.input: I need a GitLab CI pipeline for my Python Django app that builds Docker images and deploys to ECS
cases.expect: .gitlab-ci.yml with ruff, pytest, Docker build, AWS ECS deploy

cases.input: Help me automate my deployment pipeline so every push to main goes to production
cases.expect: Triggers with environment protection rules and approval gates

cases.description: Should trigger: build pipeline with quality gates
cases.input: I want a build pipeline that runs linting, tests, coverage checks, and only deploys if everything passes
cases.expect: Pipeline with quality gates, coverage threshold, conditional deployment

cases.description: Should NOT trigger: code review request
cases.input: Can you review my pull request? It adds a new authentication module.
cases.expect: code-review skill should handle this, not CI/CD pipeline

cases.description: Should NOT trigger: database schema design
cases.input: I need to design a database schema for a blog platform

cases.description: Should NOT trigger: general Docker question
cases.input: How do I optimize my Dockerfile for smaller images?
cases.expect: Docker question, not CI/CD pipeline generation
